name: Make-Ahead Sausage Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a skillet, stirring to crumble. Drain off excess fat and set aside.
2. Beat eggs until lightly colored. Add bread crumbs, milk, salt, dry mustard, and reserved sausage.
3. Stir in shredded cheese.
4. Spoon the mixture into an ungreased 1-quart souffle dish. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
5. The next day, preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Serve immediately.
